summary: Full stack test of Currency Converter Expo app. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases passed (currencies 156, rates USD/EUR, timeseries real + synthesized fallback for BTN, history CRUD, favorites CRUD). Frontend: Convert/Compare/Trends/Settings all render; keypad, CE, swap, picker modal (search + pick-INR), range pills, theme switching (dark applied correctly), chart line, settings refresh all functional.

integration_issues.issue: Trends tab shows 'No conversions yet' even after user typed amounts on Convert tab. Converter does not appear to auto-save history entries (or only saves on explicit action). Likely by design, but worth confirming if PRD intended auto-persist of each conversion.

issues: Deprecation warnings: shadow* props, Image style.resizeMode, props.pointerEvents (React Native Web). Non-blocking but should migrate to boxShadow / props.resizeMode / style.pointerEvents.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo reports version mismatches: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0), react-native-svg@15.15.4 (expected 15.12.1). App works but could cause subtle bugs.

action_items: Decide whether the converter should persist each conversion to /api/history automatically (currently Trends history stays empty after pure Convert-tab usage).
Optionally address RN Web deprecation warnings (boxShadow, props.resizeMode, style.pointerEvents).
Align package versions with Expo SDK expectations via `npx expo install --fix` when convenient.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses `entry.dict()` (Pydantic v1 style) — still works with current version but consider `model_dump()` for Pydantic v2 forward-compat.
CACHE_TTL_MIN=30 min is fine; timeseries fallback synthesis is deterministic and correctly marked source='synthesized'.
No hardcoded URLs/credentials; MONGO_URL & DB_NAME used from env; _id excluded in projections.
seed_data_creation: None persistent. Tests create/delete their own history & favorite entries; cleanup performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_currency_api.py cover currencies, rates (USD/EUR), timeseries (real+synthesized), history CRUD, favorites CRUD. Frontend public URL from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. TestIDs verified: keypad-{0-9,CE}, swap-button, picker-from/to, picker-search, pick-{CODE}, compare-amount-input, range-{7D,1M,3M,1Y}, theme-{light,dark,system}, settings-refresh. Only open question: whether Convert-tab conversions should auto-append to /api/history (currently Trends history stays empty).
